content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (May 1, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on May 1, 2026, focused on expanding cross-platform capabilities, including the introduction of a secrets vault, enhanced self-hosting connectivity for mobile and desktop, and significant dependency updates. The team also resolved build-related issues and refined the agent runtime infrastructure.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Vault and Cross-Platform Infrastructure**
*   Introduced `@elizaos/vault` for cross-platform secrets management with Settings UI integration ([#7197](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7197)).
*   Enabled self-hosted connectivity supporting HTTPS browser dashboards, Capacitor mobile builds, and Electrobun desktop builds, including CORS and bearer auth implementation ([#7212](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7212)).

**Testing and Dependency Management**
*   Removed API module mocks in `app-core` to improve test reliability ([#7226](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7226)).
*   Performed extensive dependency updates, including `@anthropic-ai/sdk` ([#7218](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7218)), `ai` SDK packages ([#7217](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7217), [#7229](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7225), [#7224](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7216), [#7215](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7215), [#7214](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7214), [#7223](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7227)), `@electric-sql/pglite` ([#7221](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7221)), and `@biomejs/biome` ([#7228](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7228)).
*   Updated CI/CD infrastructure, including Supabase Postgres docker tags and GitHub action versions ([#7219](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7219), [#7220](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7220)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   None.

## CLOSED ISSUES

**Build and Runtime Fixes**
*   Resolved missing `claude-code-stealth.mjs` preload file by implementing a self-installing module and multi-path resolution in `dev-ui.mjs` ([#7210](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7210)).
*   Addressed missing Drizzle `pgTable` definitions for entity-related tables in `plugin-sql` by verifying the submodule pointer and schema exports ([#7222](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7222)).

**Ecosystem Integration**
*   Closed issues regarding Hive Civilization x402 services and the integration of SwarmScore for portable agent reputation ([#7211](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7211), [#7213](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7213)).

## NEW ISSUES

**Database Schema**
*   Reported missing Drizzle `pgTable` definitions for `entity_identities`, `entity_merge_candidates`, and `fact_candidates` in the `plugin-sql` runtime migrator ([#7222](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7222)).

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None.
